# Trooper

> AI Workforce Platform Powered by OpenClaw — Deploy autonomous AI employees that execute real tasks using GitHub, Gmail, browsers, and APIs.

## About

Trooper is an AI workforce platform built on OpenClaw technology. It enables teams to deploy multiple AI employees (agents) that work autonomously — making GitHub commits, sending emails, browsing the web, and executing complex multi-step tasks. From the creators of ClawdBot and MoltBot.

## Core Features

- AI Workforce Teams: Deploy multiple AI agents that collaborate on tasks
- GitHub Integration: AI employees make real commits, PRs, and code reviews
- Task Execution: Autonomous multi-step task completion
- Persistent Memory: AI agents remember context across sessions
- Browser Control: AI agents navigate and interact with websites
- System Access: Secure access to files, terminals, and APIs
- Email Automation: AI agents compose and send emails via Gmail
- Skills & Plugins: 3,000+ OpenClaw skills for extending agent capabilities
- Multi-Agent Collaboration: Multiple AI agents working together
- Chat Interfaces: Conversational UI for interacting with AI workforce
- Messaging Channels: Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Email

## Messaging Channels

Connect your Trooper workforce to the apps you already use:
- Hub: https://trooper.so/channels
- Slack: https://trooper.so/channels/slack
- WhatsApp: https://trooper.so/channels/whatsapp
- Telegram: https://trooper.so/channels/telegram
- Discord: https://trooper.so/channels/discord
- Signal: https://trooper.so/channels/signal
- iMessage: https://trooper.so/channels/imessage
- Email: https://trooper.so/channels/email

## AI Teams

- Coding: https://trooper.so/teams/coding
- Marketing: https://trooper.so/teams/marketing
- Sales: https://trooper.so/teams/sales
- Legal: https://trooper.so/teams/lawyers
- Engineering: https://trooper.so/teams/engineering

## Skills Catalog

Browse 3,000+ OpenClaw skills at: https://trooper.so/integration
Skills are installable via: npx clawhub@latest install <skill-name>
Categories include: Coding Agents & IDEs, Browser Automation, Data & Analytics, DevOps, Testing, Documentation, and more.
